name: John Doe
history: Past experiences of pressure related to performance and social interactions. Reports presenting a confident front and hiding vulnerability. A recent business failure led to financial hardship.
intermediate_belief: If I don't succeed, I will be seen as weak and incapable.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't handle the pressure and will fail again.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of financial discussions and seeking distractions through activities.
situation: Invited to visit their sister while dealing with financial instability.
auto_thought: I can't manage my finances and everything is falling apart.
behavior: Avoids addressing financial issues directly and engages in activities to distract from stress.
